Merge pull request #7 from alihamzanasir/abdulrehman705-patch-1

Update README.md

Update documentation to reflect rebranding from TAPP Engine to Buildmarkets

- Changed all instances of "TAPP Engine" to "Buildmarkets" across multiple documentation files, including index, wealth management, and API references.
- Updated descriptions, titles, and examples to align with the new branding.
- Revised quick start guides and integration patterns to ensure consistency with the Buildmarkets API.
commits.messageHeadline: Update documentation to reflect rebranding from TAPP Engine to Buildm…

commits.message:
Add FIX Gateway documentation and new content for wealth management

- Introduced new documentation files for the FIX Gateway, including order types, session protocol, and execution reports.
- Added wealth management API documentation detailing integration patterns and use cases.
- Created new documents for managing compliance and brokerage documents, including retrieval and emailing processes.
- Updated index and wealth management pages to reflect new branding and enhanced descriptions.
commits.messageHeadline: Add FIX Gateway documentation and new content for wealth management

commits.message:
Add documentation and styling for Buildmarkets integration

- Introduced a new changelog file detailing API updates and features.
- Created custom CSS for the landing page to enhance visual presentation.
- Updated various documentation files to reflect the transition from Bluum Finance to Buildmarkets, including API references, quick start guides, and integration instructions.
- Added wealth management API documentation and sandbox setup instructions.
- Revised descriptions and titles across multiple files to align with the new branding and features.
commits.messageHeadline: Add documentation and styling for Buildmarkets integration

commits.message:
Update project details and assets for Buildmarkets

- Changed project name from "Bluum Finance" to "Buildmarkets" in .atlas-analysis.json and docs.json.
- Updated color scheme in both configuration files.
- Added new font settings and background colors in docs.json.
- Included favicon and logo assets for light and dark themes.
commits.messageHeadline: Update project details and assets for Buildmarkets

commits.message:
Add Mintlify skills and documentation files

- Created skills-lock.json to manage Mintlify skills.
- Added SKILL.md for Mintlify and Mintlify-docs with best practices, CLI commands, and content organization guidelines.
- Established symbolic links for Mintlify and Mintlify-docs in the Claude directory.
commits.messageHeadline: Add Mintlify skills and documentation files

commits.message: Initial commit from Mintlify hosted docs
commits.messageHeadline: Initial commit from Mintlify hosted docs
